programme.title: Believers Walk Of Faith With B Winston
programme.desc: Join Bill Winston where he is preaching the gospel of the Kingdom throughout the world and training believers how to live independently from this world system and have dominion over it.

programme.title: It's Supernatural With Sid Roth
programme.desc: With a desire for all people to know Jesus, investigative reporter Sid Roth verifies the supernatural and teaches viewers how to have closeness with God.

programme.title: Believer's Voice Of Victory
programme.desc: Kenneth and Gloria Copeland teach about faith, love, healing, prosperity, redemption, righteousness, the anointing and principles of victorious Christian living through the uncompromised Word of God.

programme.title: Legacy TV - Jeremy & Sarah Pearsons
programme.desc: We believe there are two kinds of legacies: the one you keep and the one you leave. Jeremy and Sarah Pearsons present the Word of God with sincerity, passion, and a deep-rooted revelation.

programme.title: Enjoying Everyday Life With Joyce...
programme.desc: 'Enjoying Everyday Life With Joyce Meyer'. Joyce Meyer has a television broadcast that is designed to preach the gospel to every nation, every day. We are able to reach millions of people around the world with the love of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Winning Ways With Matthew Ashimolowo
programme.desc: Pastor Ashimolowo uses his dynamic gift as a pastor, teacher, mentor, businessman and spiritual father to inspire people to grow up in knowledge, grow big in the Great Commission and grow together in unity.

programme.title: Living Life With Theo Wolmarans
programme.desc: Theo and Beverley Wolmarans wants to bring people into the family of Jesus Christ, develop them into Christian maturity and equip them for their ministry in the church in order to magnify God and His Holy Name.

programme.title: The Gospel Truth With Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Teaching the truth of the Gospel to the body of Christ with special emphasis on God's unconditional love and the balance between grace and faith.

programme.title: No More Curse
programme.desc: 'And there shall be no more curse...' (Revelation 22:3). The curse of sin met its death at the Cross of Christ. Join Tracy Harris as he unpacks this truth to see miracles of wholeness and destinies restored in the Kingdom.

programme.title: Behind The Faith
programme.desc: 'S6/E37 of 51'. Hosted by Drs André and Jenny Roebert. Join the Faith Team as they give you updates on the happenings behind the scenes of Africa's premier Christian network.

programme.title: Sparkling Gems With Rick Renner
programme.desc: Be inspired by the amazing cache of rich, enduring treasures mined from deep within the Word, unlocked by Rick Renner. This devotion is sure to inspire and provoke you to plunge deeper into God's Word.

programme.title: Grassroots With Angus Buchan
programme.desc: Angus, a farming evangelist, will take you back to the basics of Christianity, on this show, that is committed to the truth. Join Shalom Ministries as Angus shares a powerful, yet simple message straight out of the word of God.

programme.title: In Touch With Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Dr Stanley shares life-changing Biblical principles in an effort to fulfil the Great Commission. The goal of the In Touch broadcast is to reach as many people as possible to the glory of God, in the power of the Holy Spirit.

programme.title: Love Israel With Baruch Korman
programme.desc: The purpose of this program is to provide biblically-based teachings with an emphasis on the Jewish context of scripture. We believe that all people will benefit from our teachings.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack Ministries
programme.desc: Each person is made up of three different parts: spirit, soul, and body. Learn how these three parts relate to God and to each other, and how to release the life that is already in your spirit, into your physical body and emotions.

programme.title: The Dooley And Pals Show
programme.desc: We educate children, incorporating discovery and entertainment. Dooley and his robot buddy M.A.R.T.I.E. land on Earth and quickly make friends in the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Believer's Voice Of Victory
programme.desc: Kenneth and Gloria Copeland teach about faith, love, healing, prosperity, redemption, righteousness, the anointing and principles of victorious Christian living through the uncompromised Word of God.

programme.title: Tree Of Life
programme.desc: Join Benjamin Conway as he shares powerful truths about God's goodness, grace and healing power. He will teach you how to dream big, inspire you to dream, and challenge you to walk in your dreams.

programme.title: Believers Walk Of Faith With B Winston
programme.desc: Join Bill Winston where he is preaching the gospel of the Kingdom throughout the world and training believers how to live independently from this world system and have dominion over it.

programme.title: Faith Today
programme.desc: Join Dr Andre and Jenny as they share exciting news and interview guests from all around the world.

programme.title: Hour Of Salvation - David Ibiyeomie
programme.desc: David Ibiyeomie is the presiding Pastor of Salvation Ministries. Pastor to millions across the globe, he is also a teacher and writer with the sole aim of impacting lives.

programme.title: Enjoying Everyday Life With Joyce...
programme.desc: 'Enjoying Everyday Life With Joyce Meyer'. Joyce Meyer has a television broadcast that is designed to preach the gospel to every nation, every day. We are able to reach millions of people around the world with the love of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: The Jewish Jesus With Rabbi Kirt...
programme.desc: 'The Jewish Jesus With Rabbi Kirt Schneider'. One of the few television ministries that focuses on the Judaic roots of the Christian faith and the connection between the Old and New Testaments.

programme.title: Hosting The Supernatural
programme.desc: A talk show hosted by Apostle Nicky van der Westhuizen. The show features special guest interviews, musical performances, family and leadership insights, and segments on how to host the supernatural in our daily lives.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now With G Maldonado
programme.desc: Apostle Maldonado works with internationally known ministers and evangelists bringing hope to untold millions. His vision is to evangelise, affirm and send people to do the Will of God.

programme.title: Empower Church
programme.desc: Join another revelatory word with Ps Gebhardt and Shannon Berndt, Senior Pastors of Empower Church.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programme.desc: Excellence is the standard of life that Creflo insists on. His goal is to teach the Gospel of Jesus with simplicity and understanding, changing the world one person at a time.

programme.desc: Pastor Ashimolowo uses his dynamic gift as a pastor, teacher, mentor, businessman and spiritual father to inspire people to grow up in knowledge, grow big in the Great Commission and grow together in unity.

programme.desc: Inspired by a real story, a determined high school senior strives to be a wrestler one last time despite having cerebral palsy.

programme.title: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A noir thriller about an auto theft police detective who tries to help a friend find his missing daughter.

programme.title: Under Siege
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL, now a cook, is the only person who can stop a gang of terrorists when they seize control of a US Navy battleship.

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: When detective John Shaw uncovers evidence linking his fellow officers to a murder, they frame him for a homicide he didn't commit.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: A young man (Bruce Lee) sworn to an oath of non-violence breaks it after his master is murdered and he discovers the factory he works in is a front for drug-smuggling.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A gangster that everyone believed to be dead mysteriously reappears to avenge himself upon his former boss and find his missing son.

programme.title: Triumph
programme.desc: Inspired by a real story, a determined high school senior strives to be a wrestler one last time despite having cerebral palsy.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Unable to tip a waitress, a man promises her that if he wins the lottery, she'll get half. When he wins, he wants to make good on his word, but his wife will do anything to stop this.

programme.title: Anthem Of A Teenage Prophet
programme.desc: A teenager foresees the death of his best friend. When this premonition comes true, he must deal with being nicknamed 'The Prophet of Death'.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan are back but the game has changed. They have to return to the dangerous world to rescue one of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Bird's Advice for Sad Poets
programme.desc: In the emotionally charged and wild world of James Whitman, we see his struggle to overcome anxiety and depression by seeking advice from Dr Bird.

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Death is everywhere in this riveting horror. A teenager's vision prevents him and his friends from dying in a plane crash. But the Grim Reaper begins to hunt them down one by one.

programme.title: The Power Of One
programme.desc: An orphaned South African boy turns to a worldly-wise prison inmate. This man teaches him how to box in order to defend himself against his schoolmates.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: When he gets blackmailed into competing against the 'bad boy of karate

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: Michael Fassbender stars as the popular video game protagonist in this action-packed fantasy. A man is transported into the past of his ancestor who was a master assassin.

programme.title: Street Kings
programme.desc: When evidence implicates a veteran cop in the execution of a fellow officer, he is forced to go up against the cop culture he's been a part of for his entire career.

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - It's Coming for the Cabin'. Jim and his father have gone camping in the Upper Peninsula of Michigan. But at the dead of night, an unknown creature approaches their tent.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Stonehenge On Mars'. A NASA probe captures an image of a familiar structure on the surface of Mars. What made 'Mars Henge'? Plus, how did an Apollo astronaut get sick on the Moon?

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Cursed Mummy Tribe'. Deep in the Peruvian jungle, dozens of mummies have been found in cliffside tombs. Archaeologist Ramy Romany searches for evidence of who these people were.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S23/E3 - Presidential Premonition'. Don investigates an eerie premonition about a presidential assassination, a legendary treasure and a miraculous resurrection of 40,000-year-old worms.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: 'S23/E5 - Cosmic Collision'. Don Wildman investigates a haunted hotel that inspired a bestselling book, a strange green orb at a football game and the most famous ear in history.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - They Walk Among Us'. Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot's cosmic origins.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - The Rise And Fall Of The Ruby Empire'. The team are pulling out rubies by the scores. But with low food supply and bad weather, the team has to muster its strength to finish the job.

programme.desc: 'S9/E15 - Divine Intervention'. Jackie's surprise open marriage discussion has some couples tongue-tied, but others lean in. Later that night, old tensions rise up as Heavenly and Contessa finally say what's on their minds.

programme.title: The Talk
programme.desc: 'S12/E202 - Aldis Hodge'. Celebrity hosts discuss entertainment, politics and current events.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S5/E214'. Nomafu is in bed with the enemy and Zweli refuses to give up when faced with a sly enemy.

programme.title: Lingashoni
programme.desc: 'S2/E148'. Gagashe turns the tables on his family from the grave. Brenda is given the hand but she wants the whole arm. Papi and Puleng are almost exposed.

programme.title: Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Welcome Back To The Neighborhood'. When Dave decides to disconnect the Johnson home from the grid, he inadvertently causes a community-wide power outage, much to Calvin's frustration.

programme.title: Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Welcome To The Pit Stop, How May I Help You'. When Calvin takes Dave's suggestion to try a new method of promoting his business, he soon comes to regret it.

programme.title: Imboni Yama Tekisi
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Nthabiseng refuses to enter her mother's house. Sabelo is on a warpath, while the Biyela brothers are issued a warning.

programme.title: Uthando neS'thembu
programme.desc: 'S6/E10'. Musa pays MaKhumalo a long-awaited visit. MaYeni decides to take centre stage, and MaNgwabe is forced to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S5/E215'. Bukhosi tries to outrun his past and Zweli has never been sadder about being right.

programme.title: For The Love Of Money
programme.desc: Keri Hilson leads this crime thriller filled with power, money, and danger. A single mother pushed to her limit turns to the criminal underworld to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. 'n Kortformaat dokumentêre reeks wat weekliks oor plaaslike landboukwessies gesels. Planne en raad word gedeel deur ons span kenners.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Toe 'n man van Pretoria vermis geraak het, het privaatspeurder Odette van Staden ondersoek ingestel en hom vinnig opgespoor.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Dis die laaste dag van die trouvrou-stryd en net een uitdaging lê voor vir die top-drie deelnemers: Hulle moet wys dat hulle goeie gasvroue is. Wie sal wegstap met die kontantprys van 'n halfmiljoen rand?

programme.title: Kelderklas
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Jack Parow neem JP na Van Ryn's-brandewyn waar hulle alles, van 5 tot 25 jaar oue brandewyn, proe. Hulle ontdek ook 'n paar skemerkelkies.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Suid-Afrikaanse beeldhouer Adriaan Diedericks en leer hoe hy in die Franse platteland 'n ou vervalle skuur omskep in 'n ateljee.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E3'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Die VIA-Kersmark
programme.desc: VIA-Kersmark gee lekker idees vir geskenke dié kerstyd. Ons wys en spog met plaaslike entrepreneurs se produkte en só kry álmal geskenke onder die kersboom hierdie jaar.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. 'n Kortformaat dokumentêre reeks wat weekliks oor plaaslike landboukwessies gesels. Planne en raad word gedeel deur ons span kenners.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Toe 'n man van Pretoria vermis geraak het, het privaatspeurder Odette van Staden ondersoek ingestel en hom vinnig opgespoor.

programme.title: Die Staat Teen
programme.desc: 'S2/E9'. Die staat teen Jason Rohde: Adv. Louis van Niekerk bespreek die opspraakwekkende saak wat gevolg het ná die moord op Susan Rohde.

programme.title: Kelderklas
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Jack Parow neem JP na Van Ryn's-brandewyn waar hulle alles, van 5 tot 25 jaar oue brandewyn, proe. Hulle ontdek ook 'n paar skemerkelkies.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Suid-Afrikaanse beeldhouer Adriaan Diedericks en leer hoe hy in die Franse platteland 'n ou vervalle skuur omskep in 'n ateljee.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E3'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Dinge raak kleurvol in Kemptonpark. Aaanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels help vir Jannie en Annemarie du Randt om hul TV-kamer 'n bietjie kleur te gee.

programme.title: Dr. Nou
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. Tammy is 'n lewenslustig met 'n lewe vól uitdagings en wonderwerke. As kind is sy gediagnoseer met neonatale allo-immuun trombositopenie en wil vandag ander inspireer om die beste en mooiste weergawe van hulself te wees.

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - 1/9'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. Privaatspeurder Luke Enslin staan sy kliënte by om 'n saak van statutêre verkragting te open ná hul dogter op dertien swanger raak.

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E13'. In 'n oogwink kan alles verander, wat wel die geval was toe Johan binne 'n kwessie van 'n splitsekonde rooi gesien en beheer verloor het. Dié tragiese insident het baie lewens verwoes.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Petré en Carina Prins en leer hoe hierdie hardwerkende Suid-Afrikaners 'n vervalle ou Franse huisie omskep in 'n oase van rustigheid.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S3/E8'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Wys My 'n Huis
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. In hierdie episode is getroude paartjie Charita en Rize op soek na 'n beleggingseiendom in die hartjie van Johannesburg. Hul beste vriend Kabelo kom lewer 'n opinie as buitestaander.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Die aanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels raak kreatief in Krugersdorp. Hulle help vir Zandré de Witt om 'n kombuis in 'n historiese huis nuwe lewe te gee.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E8'. Lukas Burger, 'n top boerbokteler van Griekwastad in die Noord-Kaap, bedryf sy stoet saam met sy lewensmaat en twee van sy kinders. Saam lewer hulle telkens kampioene op.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E4'. Ons loer in by Daleen van Zyl van Dalvan Simbras naby Potchefstroom, wat tegnologie inspan om die beweging van haar kudde te bestuur. Data-tegnologie sorg vir gesonder, veiliger diere en 'n meer winsgewende boerdery.

programme.title: Vergewe My
programme.desc: 'S4/E1'. Oortreders wat op soek is na vergifnis besoek hulle slagoffers en dié se naastes. Sal hierdie ontmoeting tot versoening lei of nie?

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S5/E1'. Oortreders vertel ons van die misdade wat hulle in die tronk laat beland, die tyd wat hulle agter tralies spandeer het, en hoe hulle ná hul vrylating hulle lewens in die buitewêreld herbou het.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Elbé en Christo Lindeque en leer hoe hierdie eklektiese Suid-Afrikaners 'n pragtige kasteel in die Franse platteland restoureer.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E8'. Lyntjie Jaars kuier in Minki se sitkamer. Sy's 'n Namakwalander in murg en been, en vertel van haar grootwordjare in die Noord-Kaap. Sy het sedertdien haar merk in die vermaaklikheidbedryf gemaak. 'n Rolmodel verras haar.

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. Dr. Elna beantwoord 'n kyker se vraag oor libido en of dit mettertyd verander. 'n Ontstelde ouer het haar dogter betrap tydens seks en soek nou hulp. Die span gesels ook oor liefdestale.

programme.title: Froggies

programme.desc: 'S1/E46'. Dee Dee and Spike, the children's dance series: Each episode takes you to a fun place and teaches children playful dance moves, whilst building on their vocabulary.

programme.title: Ngiyakuthanda Thando

programme.desc: Ndabezitha Mahlangu mediates in the case of a wife fearing for her life after a family business goes wrong. In another case, two traditional healers do not see eye to eye.

programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. My Life In Music is a show hosted by Thabo Mokwele and filmed entirely in a radio studio. Inspirational people tell their life stories, set against the background of and influenced by music.

programme.desc: 'S2/E43 of 39'. The lively animal kingdom twins, Tjiff and Tjaff, are very inquisitive! They can't wait to play outside each day. But what can they do outside? Come and play with Tjiff and Tjaff.

programme.title: Zim Zim

programme.title: Froggies
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Auntie Hop the frog tells stories that make you sit up and listen. Her chatty little frog companions can't get enough of her stories about the African animal kingdom.

programme.title: Rat-Tat-Tat
programme.desc: 'S1/E47'. The clever antelope and skunk are travelling through the country. They discover all sorts of interesting places and meet a lot of friends along the way.

programme.title: Trixi
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Trixi plays on the computer to learn more about wild animals and plants.

programme.title: Lappies
programme.desc: 'S1/E82'. Lappies the lion is the prince of the bushveld and heir to the throne because his dad is the king. Lappies learns, plays and experiences as many adventures everyday with his friends.

programme.title: Dee Dee & Spike
programme.desc: 'S1/E56'. Dee Dee and Spike, the children's dance series: Each episode takes you to a fun place and teaches children playful dance moves, whilst building on their vocabulary.

programme.title: My Top 10: My Life In Music
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. My Life In Music is a show hosted by Thabo Mokwele and filmed entirely in a radio studio. Inspirational people tell their life stories, set against the background of and influenced by music.

programme.title: Lingashoni
programme.desc: 'S1/E124'. Seipati serves Puleng a TKO. New information about Prudence's death lands on Tebatso's lap. Papi keeps hitting a brick wall with Letlotlo.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E109 - Out With The Old'. Cobra is seduced by the promise of a new life and Nomonde takes bold new steps for Khanyisa Diamonds.

programme.title: Greed And Desire
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Cancer'. Thakane decides it's time for Maru to become leader, not realising he is the cancer in the family. Oarabile blows off Tselane's words as a desperate lie to get her to end things with Maru.

programme.title: Osbali
programme.desc: Bhekumuzi challenges Tshepo to a day in his life as a taxi driver to prove his masculinity. Tshepo encounters problems with passengers, change and rival taxi drivers.

programme.title: Lingashoni
programme.desc: 'S1/E124'. Seipati serves Puleng a TKO. New information about Prudence's death lands on Tebatso's lap. Papi keeps hitting a brick wall with Letlotlo.

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: 'S5/E134'. Noma is feeling the pressure. Siyanda considers turning on her friends to save herself but is she already too late?

programme.title: Ngeso Lika Makhelwane
programme.desc: A serious medical condition forces a pregnant woman to make a heart-breaking decision.

programme.title: The Ranakas
programme.desc: 'S5/E6'. The Ranaka boys take some time out from the family to reconnect. Katlego tries her luck at the dating game. Manaka and Mpumi have a surprise in store for their sister-in-law Michelle.

programme.title: Our Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: 'S10/E16'. On this episode of OPW, we take a look at the different modes of transport used by OPW couples to move from home, matrimonial and reception.

programme.title: Date My Family
programme.desc: 'S8/E1'. Tonight's bachelor is Mbulelo Mdeleni who lives in Soweto. He says he was raised with traditional values and he doesn't want to date a slay queen because he can't afford one.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E50'. There's drama at Langa's funeral. Don is forced to go back to Bongani, hat in hand. Sibongile starts warming up to life in Gomora.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E110 - Goodness, Mercy & Gail'. An experienced criminal takes an interest in Cobra's business ventures. Detective Tshabalala has an unpleasant surprise for Zweli.

programme.title: Unmarried
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. Thembi worries that if she introduces her kids to Bright it will be like she's using him to get closer to Mbali again.

programme.title: Becoming...
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. It is the feather awards and Yaya will be attending this glamorous event. Gugu takes a leap of faith and visits his friend to enquire on any possible job opportunities.

programme.title: Mntase
programme.desc: 'S2/E6'. Puseletso mistakenly exposed her sister's long-held secret, with startling consequences. Can the sisters forgive each other and let bygones be bygones?

programme.title: Wounds
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Mabalwa is convinced that Neo and Agnes are trying to sabotage her relationship with Dr Smooth.

programme.title: Isithembiso
programme.desc: 'S1/E163'. Claudia wonders what to do with a secret that will determine Banzi's fate. Elsewhere, Banzi warns Simi that there are consequences to betraying him.

programme.title: Mampara
programme.desc: An incredibly smart teenager is the target of bullying at his school. When a gigantic new pupil arrives at the school, the two find comfort in each other.

programme.title: Kendra Sells Hollywood
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Split Decisions'. Time is running out, and Kendra has yet to meet her qualifications to stay with the company. Given one last chance, she must choose between her kids and her career.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: 'S13/E12'. David Bromstad helps lucky Americans buy their dream properties. The families, couples and individuals have won big in the lottery or on scratch cards.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S26/E11 - Setting Sail To Oak Island'. A busy couple has always loved taking trips to the tranquil shores of Oak Island. Realizing life is short, they want to permanently move to the beach.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - A Veteran Home Makeover'. Chip and Joanna are joined by a professional football player to give a Vietnam veteran a home makeover. Will everything go to plan?

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 - Starting From Scratch'. Mina and Karen discover that the only way to save an abandoned fire-damaged home is to rebuild it from scratch. They revive it with a French-inspired design.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - The Sky's The Limit'. Ben and Erin help a client who has lived all over the world. He wants a property with plenty of space, a modern and industrial kitchen and he has an unlimited budget.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 - Midcentury Markup'. Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home with mid-century architectural details that could sell for top dollar. However, they're forced to outbid other investors.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S7/E1 - Georgia Peach Pool Paradise'. A family dreams of building a tropical pool paradise in Georgia. But hard soil and a complex river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: The Great Giveback With Melissa...
programme.desc: 'The Great Giveback With Melissa McCarthy And Jenna Perusich. S1/E4 - Makeover For Mama'. Melissa and Jenna create a dream kitchen for a mum who feeds her community. The duo face challenges to finish their most emotional giveback yet!

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: 'S7/E4 - Quaint Cottage, Vintage Vibes'. Mina and Karen upgrade a quaint but pricey cottage. They must work out how to add a garage, a bedroom, and a bathroom without losing its vintage charm.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S18/E4 - Best Of Both Worlds In Bethany'. A couple are ready to purchase a property in Bethany Beach, Delaware. They have a budget of $365,000 to find a family beach condo.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S18/E5 - Secluded On The Sea Islands'. A couple have $499,000 to spend on a dream holiday home. After initially looking on Hilton Head, they have decided to explore other local islands.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S18/E6 - Fetching A Home In Newport'. A young couple want to find a permanent home in the coastal town of Newport, Oregon. They have a budget of $350,000 to find a property with beach access.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S18/E7 - A Sweet Cranberry Coastal Deal'. A couple have $335,000 to spend on their dream beachfront property. An old friend helps them look for a home on the Washington coast.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S18/E9 - Mining For Deals In Gold Beach'. A family looks for a full-time beachfront home to give them more space in Gold Beach, Oregon. They have a budget of $395,000 to spend.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S18/E12 - Pursuing The Panoramic Views Of Plymouth'. A woman looks for a permanent beach home in her favourite summer spot of Plymouth, Massachusetts, with a budget of $375,000.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E9 - Ponds Have More Fun'. A Texas family asks the team to build a natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys also build an expansive creek waterfall and natural rock steps.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Cabanas and Cannonballs'. An Austin, Texas, couple wants the family pool of their kids' dreams. The team builds an oversized spill over spa and a special place just for cannonballs.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Southern Oasis Pool'. A family wants to turn their Houston, TX, yard into a Southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and new material cause problems for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S7/E5 - Dueling Waterslides'. Brian and Paul design a pool featuring giant duelling waterslides. But, they hit problems when they face equipment issues while building an artificial hill.

programme.title: Pool Kings
programme.desc: 'S7/E6 - A Pool With a View'. In California, Paul and Brian have a tough job transforming an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.
